answers: Metaverse = shared virtual worlds where people interact, work, play, and socialize. Think internet you step inside.
Access: VR headsets (Meta Quest), PC-based worlds (Roblox, Fortnite), and browser-based (Decentraland, Spatial).
Current state: still early. Gaming metaverses (Roblox, Fortnite) most mature. Enterprise metaverse for meetings growing.
Metaverse future: virtual offices, concerts, shopping, education. Companies like Meta, Apple, Microsoft investing billions.
